attempts.hypothesis: The first observed system_clk rising edge after reset should be treated as a completed measured interval; the original candidate ignored it and did not start counting until after that edge.

attempts.hypothesis: jitter_detected may be expected to remain asserted after any bad interval instead of pulsing for one clk cycle.

attempts.hypothesis: Late jitter should be detected as soon as the monitored clock is overdue, not only when a later system_clk rising edge arrives; the threshold should be the exact boundary rather than threshold +/- 1.
attempts.failure_summary: Black-box evaluator returned status fail. All six cocotb parameterizations failed: test_clock_jitter_detection[0-5], [0-7], [0-10], [1-5], [1-7], and [1-10].

attempts.hypothesis: system_clk may be intended as a sampled period-marker pulse level, with jitter_detected reflecting whether the just-ended low interval exceeded JITTER_THRESHOLD.
